scripts:
set properties on /content/dam/wknd/jcr:content
  set cq:conf{String} to /conf/wknd
  set jcr:title{String} to "WKND Sites Project"
end
create service user cards-service-user with path /home/users/system/cards-service-user

set ACL for cards-service-user
  allow jcr:read on /content/dam/wknd
end
